articles.author: Dan Balz, Scott Clement
articles.title: 60% disapprove of Trump ahead of State of the Union, Post-ABC poll finds - The Washington Post
articles.description: But Democrats have made little headway in persuading Americans that they have better ideas or policies to offer.
articles.content: As President Donald Trump prepares to address the nation Tuesday evening, Americans remain generally sour about his performance, with majorities disapproving of his handling of priority initiatives w… [+110 chars]
